title: How to find the men who'll actually tell you the truth
caption:
Most men don't have a brother. They have an audience.

A group chat full of guys who agree with everything you say is not brotherhood. It's theater — and it keeps you exactly where you are.

The real thing looks different. It's the man who needs you to be real, not impressive. The one who follows up. The one who wounds you with the truth because he trusts you enough to risk it.

"Wounds from a friend can be trusted." — Proverbs 27:6.

You find your real ones by going first. Share something true before you share your highlights. Make the specific ask. Tell them what's actually hard, not just what's moving.

The list will be short. Two or three guys, maybe. That's the whole point.

Tag the man who tells you the truth.

#faith #brotherhood #christianmen #godlymen #accountability #mensministry #proverbs #christianity #discipleship #manofgod
